method: StainCF-PMS Phase 0: Counterfactual Stain Sensitivity and Prompt-Mask Consistency Audit

data_isolation.monuseg: train only; calibration source images and audit crop parent images disjoint

interpretation.strong: For a real stain view, stable |delta AJI| >= 0.020 OR stable |delta PQ| >= 0.020; then inspect AJI+, DQ, SQ, TP/FP/FN and sample consistency.
interpretation.composite: Stable AJI and PQ changes around 0.010 or more are valuable composite evidence.
interpretation.authority: No automatic GO/NO-GO. The PI adjudicates the complete artifact.
